I found **3 hardcoded email addresses** in the webapp source code. All of them are located in `UsersController.scala`:

| File | Line | Email |
|------|------|-------|
| UsersController.scala | 9 | alice@example.com |
| UsersController.scala | 10 | bob@example.com |
| UsersController.scala | 11 | charlie@example.com |

These appear to be test/demo user accounts in the user data fixture. The markdown documentation files (README.md, changelog.md) did not contain any email addresses.
